scripts.serve: npx spago build && node -e "require('spago').run({cmd: 'bundle-app', main: 'Main', to: './index.js', platform: 'node'})" && node ./index.js
scripts.start: npx spago build && node -e "require('spago').run({cmd: 'bundle-app', main: 'Main', to: './index.js', platform: 'node'})" && node ./index.js
